$comment: Schema v1.3 (extends v1.2). Adds optional imagery.logoLibrary as a directory pointer mirroring imagery.{photoLibrary,backgroundLibrary,shapeLibrary,templateLibrary}. Brings the logo/ folder into the imagery vocabulary so Gate 12's INDEX.md cross-checks can treat all asset libraries uniformly; the existing top-level logos[] array remains the source of truth for tagged variants (light-bg, dark-bg, watermark, favicon) consumed by render scripts. Backward-compatible with v1.2. Versioned independently of plugin semver.
title: erfana-skills brand manifest
description: Schema for brand.json manifests under skills/design-shared/brands/<id>/. One file per brand. Discovered by convention (folder name = id). See brands/README.md for the full contract including the default tokensContract.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for IDE / editor hints. Typically '../brand.schema.json'.

id.description: Brand id. Lowercase ASCII + hyphens, no consecutive hyphens, must equal the parent folder basename. Enforced by Gate 12.

displayName.description: Human-readable brand name (e.g., 'Qodeca', 'ACME Corp'). Used in marketing copy and Claude responses.

legalName.description: Legal entity that owns the brand (e.g., 'Qodeca sp. z o.o.'). Used in copyright lines.

version.description: Brand-manifest semver. Independent from plugin version. Bump on schema-shape changes within a brand.

tokens.description: Relative path (from this manifest) to a DTCG 2025.10 design-tokens file (e.g., './tokens.tokens.json'). Optional but strongly recommended. Tokens MUST be wrapped under a top-level group whose key equals this manifest's id.

tokensContract.description: Optional override of the default token contract. Maps dotted token paths (relative to the brand-id wrapping group in tokens.tokens.json) to expected DTCG $type strings. Gate 12 enforces every entry resolves to a token of the declared type. When omitted, the default contract from brands/README.md applies (color.brand.{primary,accent,surface-dark,text-light}, typography.fontFamily.{primary,display,mono}). Declaring this field is an explicit production-readiness decision; it surfaces in PR review.

logos.description: Logo variants. Each entry points at a real file under the brand folder.

src.description: Relative path to the logo file.

usage.description: Usage tags. Canonical values are listed in the anyOf enum branch (IDE autocomplete-friendly); arbitrary strings are also accepted via the string branch. Consumers filter by tag.

typography.description: Font-family roles (e.g., 'primary', 'display', 'mono'). Values are font-family strings; consumers feed them into CSS or PPTX export pipelines.

voice.description: Voice / tone metadata. Schema is strict so typos like 'watermak' fail validation. Forward compatibility is handled via schema versioning — adding a new optional field bumps the schema to v1.2 with no breaking impact on existing brands.

attributes.description: Tone descriptors. Canonical values from the Nielsen / Mailchimp tone-axis literature are listed in the anyOf enum branch (IDE autocomplete-friendly); arbitrary strings are also accepted.

doNotUse.description: Words / phrases that violate brand voice. Used by Claude as negative constraints when generating copy.

watermark.description: Canonical watermark for animation / video outputs. Single source of truth — never hardcode in scripts. v1: bare string. v1.1+: optional object form for placement / color / font control (consumers will land in v2.4+).

guide.description: Relative path to long-form voice / tone prose (e.g., './voice.md').

photoLibrary.description: Relative path to the brand's photo library directory.

illustrationStyle.description: Relative path to the brand's illustration-style guide (typically './illustration.md'). Should NOT point at voice.md — illustration and voice are separate concerns.

backgroundLibrary.description: Relative path to a directory of brand background images (e.g., './backgrounds/'). Mirrors photoLibrary — a path pointer, not a file enumeration. Consumers list the directory at consumption time.

shapeLibrary.description: Relative path to a directory of brand shape-vocabulary SVGs (e.g., './shapes/'). Used by sub-skills for decorative cuts, arrows, and editorial accents. Mirrors photoLibrary.

templateLibrary.description: Relative path to a directory of brand templates (e.g., './templates/'). Forward-looking slot for slide masters, layout sketches, and other reference templates. SVGs under templates/ subfolders bypass Gate 5 content rules — they are reference material, not loaded by render-video.js.

logoLibrary.description: Relative path to the brand's logo directory (e.g., './logo/'). Schema v1.3+. Brings logos into the imagery vocabulary so the per-library INDEX.md and Gate 12 cross-checks treat them uniformly with shapes / photos / backgrounds. The existing top-level logos[] array remains the source of truth for tagged variants (light-bg, dark-bg, watermark, favicon) — logoLibrary is the catalog pointer, not a replacement.

platforms.description: Platforms the brand is designed for. Open string set; canonical values include 'ios', 'android', 'web', 'desktop', 'print', 'tv', 'watch', 'embed'. Consumers may filter assets by platform.
